summary: July 2024 Cavallo newsletter covering Carole and Greg's visit to the Calgary Stampede where draft horses wore BFB hoof boots, plus Canada Day and US Independence Day photos from the community.
June 2024 Cavallo newsletter featuring Chad, a Percheron draft horse giving carriage rides at Disneyland in BFB boots, and a trail safety story about a horse sinking in a bog.
March 2024 Cavallo newsletter announcing the monthly email-list free-boot winner and sharing employee Jenny's message about Cavallo's donations to horse rescues and therapy centers.
May 2023 Cavallo newsletter sharing a testimonial about boots helping a horse recover from a recurring abscessed hoof, plus commentary on horse owners taking charge of hoof care decisions.
September/October 2023 Cavallo newsletter teasing the new Purple Trek boot, featuring Dan James's stunt work, and a testimonial from Carolyn Gaedtke about a carriage-driving road accident.
May 2024 Cavallo newsletter promoting the Western States Horse Expo appearance with Dan James, a special offer, and a Life at Liberty podcast episode debunking horse-behaviour myths.
April 2022 Cavallo newsletter announcing a Facebook Hoof Boot Pad Party Pack contest and recapping Carole's well-attended presentations and customer stories at Equine Affaire in Ohio.
August 2021 Cavallo newsletter with Carole's 12 points to consider when buying hoof boots, a staff family feature about Kate Stipec on Griffy, and a customer testimonial about trimming.
December 2021 Cavallo newsletter spotlighting the film 'Reggie' starring Cavallo-sponsored therapy mini Kiwi and promoting the Trek boot as a holiday gift for barefoot and shod horses.
February 2022 special-edition Cavallo newsletter compiling 2021 customer testimonials, a Facebook boot-storage photo contest, and a nod from a top US veterinary hospital.
January 2022 Cavallo newsletter with Carole's reflective New Year message and a feature on staffer Yvonne Welz visiting Monty Roberts's Shy Boy at his ranch during a western vacation.
January/February 2023 Cavallo newsletter offering a free laminitis recovery guide and sharing news of Carole and Greg's son graduating as an RCMP officer in Saskatchewan.
